name: FULLY OPEN SOURCE
text: WebdriverIO is fully open source and can be found on GitHub

name: GREAT COMMUNITY
text: WebdriverIO has a great community that supports all members.

name: JS.FOUNDATION
text: The JS Foundation is host to projects that span the entire JavaScript ecosystem.

name: SUPPORT VIDEOS
text: The community around WebdriverIO is actively speaking on various user groups or conferences about specific topics around automated testing with WebdriverIO.

name: EXTENDABLE
text: Adding helper functions, or more complicated sets and combinations of existing commands is simple and really useful

name: COMPATIBLE
text: WebdriverIO works in combination with most of the TDD and BDD test frameworks in the JavaScript world
